trivia: Dassault put fighter technology in a business jet: the 7X was the first bizjet with full digital fly-by-wire, flown with the same control philosophy as the Rafale. Three engines, because Dassault.
The trijet layout is a Falcon family signature and an instant identifier among a sky of twin-engined rivals.
funFacts: First business jet with digital fly-by-wire.
Its S-duct center engine echoes Dassault fighter design.
